# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources: 
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2020-11-01
    name: yourVnetName
    location: location
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes: 
          - "10.0.0.0/16"
      subnets: 
        - name: yourSubnetName
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/24"
            serviceEndpoints: 
              - service: Microsoft.Sql
              - service: Microsoft.Storage
              
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: location 
    name: yourSqlServerName
    properties: 
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      enablePrivateEndpoint: false
      
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    name: yourStorageAccountName
    location: location
    properties: 
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Allow
        bypass: AzureServices 
        virtualNetworkRules: 
          - id: /subscriptions/subscriptionId/resourceGroups/yourResourceGroupName/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/yourVnetName/subnets/yourSubnetName
